sentences.english: Excuse me, where can I find the pasta?
Pasta is in aisle five, on the left side, about halfway down.
sentences.korean: 파스타는 5번 통로 왼쪽 편, 중간쯤에 있습니다.

sentences.english: Thanks. Oh, and do you carry fresh basil?
Yes, we do. That would be in the produce section, right at the front of the store.
sentences.korean: 네, 있습니다. 농산물 코너에 있어요, 매장 맨 앞쪽이요.

quiz.question: What is the main topic of this passage?

sentences.english: Perfect. One more question — is there a self-checkout here?
sentences.korean: 완벽해요. 질문 하나만 더 — 셀프 계산대가 있나요?

sentences.english: There is! We have four self-checkout machines near the exit.
sentences.korean: 있습니다! 출구 근처에 셀프 계산대가 4대 있어요.

sentences.english: But if you have more than fifteen items, the regular checkout lanes might be faster.
sentences.korean: 하지만 물건이 15개 넘으면 일반 계산대가 더 빠를 수 있어요.

sentences.english: I only have a few things, so self-checkout sounds good.
sentences.korean: 물건이 몇 개 안 돼서 셀프 계산대가 좋겠네요.

quiz.question: What is the main topic of this passage?
options: Long-Form Journalism — The Ethics of Gene Editing
